full_text:
Wei Yao (Hongsi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Yao, styledHongsi. Worked on Wu’s history project but refused Sun Hao’s demand to list Sun He as Emperor. Wei Yao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Wei Yao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
